data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of pausing a subscription while keeping the slot reserved. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the ability to pause a subscription, but without concrete evidence or endpoints demonstrating this capability, there is a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the ability to pause a subscription while keeping the slot reserved.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint to validate subscription pause
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API allows pausing a subscription while keeping the slot reserved.
